title: Faithful - 3D Rails
description: A 3D rails addon for Faithful 32x and 64x that adds depth to your tracks while preserving the classic Faithful look.
body:
Faithful – 3D Rails is a visual addon for [Faithful 32x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-32x) and [Faithful 64x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-64x) that gives rails a three-dimensional upgrade. Designed to blend seamlessly with Faithful’s original textures, it improves detail while preserving the Faithful’s classic look.

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SqrWex52/images/5634e3308f6eb59dc315a18cb400e400332b6e01_350.webp)
